User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information stored when a user authenticates with Google Auth or Email

displayName.description: The display name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

photoURL.description: The profile picture URL of the user

createdAt.description: When the user profile was first created in our database

lastLoginAt.description: When the user last logged in

threatsFound.description: Count of critical or medium danger threats detected

safeJunkRemoved.description: Safe cache junk removed in GB

lastScanAt.description: Timestamp of the last diagnostic run

FixedIssue.title: Fixed Issue Log
FixedIssue.description: A diagnostic security element fixed by the user

AiSecurityAdviserChat.title: AI Security Adviser Chat Log
AiSecurityAdviserChat.description: User queries parsed and generated by the AI adviser system

JunkCleanHistory.title: Junk Clean History Log
JunkCleanHistory.description: Cache clean actions containing space statistics

LinkScanHistory.title: Link Scan History Log
LinkScanHistory.description: Logs for scanned URL items detailing safety risk scores

QueryTicket.title: Query Ticket
QueryTicket.description: User emergency help inquiries and messages

LaunchNotification.title: Launch Notification Waitlist
LaunchNotification.description: Waitlist signups for application launch notifications

SheetsConfig.title: Google Sheets Synchronization Config
SheetsConfig.description: Configurations mapping user forms directly to Google Sheets logs

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles synced from authentication events and diagnostic updates

/users/{userId}/fixedIssues/{issueId}.description: List of on-device issues and potential threat vulnerabilities resolved

/users/{userId}/aiSecurityAdviserChats/{.description: Dynamic Gemini feedback prompts stored in primary Firestore project

/users/{userId}/junkCleanHistory/{histor.description: Logs of user diagnostic cache cleaning activities

/users/{userId}/linkScanHistory/{history.description: Logs of scanned external URLs for threat indicators
